meta.title: Vaktirnar — Smart solutions for every shift
meta.description: Vaktirnar is an umbrella brand for smart solutions that simplify the lives of families and individuals. The first product is Krakkavaktin.

hero.title: Vaktirnar
hero.description: We build simple, powerful tools that help families and individuals organize their lives better.

krakkavaktin.name: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.description: Coordinate your children's playdates between parents. Chat, calendar and push notifications — all in one place.

krakkavaktin.title: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.subtitle: Coordinate your children's playdates
krakkavaktin.description: Krakkavaktin is a co-parenting app that simplifies communication and coordination between parents. Whether you're scheduling playdates, sending messages or tracking where the kids are — Krakkavaktin has you covered.

features.chat: Chat — Communicate directly in the app, no need for SMS
features.calendar: Calendar — Shared calendar for playdates and events
features.push: Push notifications — Get notified when something changes
features.custody: Custody overview — See the custody split between parents at a glance
